creator: giffunip@tutopia.com
text:
- Minor cleanups.
- Return port to the pool: my job doesn't leave time for proper maintenance of my ports anymore.

I have a WIP update patch for this port, JIC someone wants to take over.

How-To-Repeat: Please reset the maintainer of all my other ports too. I will try to keep updating some of them but I don't want to keep in the way of someone else taking over.
